title: v6.8 frontier: executable quality ledger foundation
description: Implement the smallest executable Quality Ledger foundation: define a canonical quality-ledger event schema, add a runtime writer for QIF-relevant evidence events, add a safe_read ledger audit, and add negative fixtures proving missing runtime evidence or contradicted claims are detectable. Acceptance: schema validates; writer records task/runtime/evidence/QIF intent refs; audit fails a review or release claim with no recent runtime evidence; focused tests pass. Stop condition: foundation only; do not auto-compute QIF verdicts and do not claim operator validation.
triage_notes: Completed v6.8 executable quality ledger foundation: schemas, writer, audit, fixture, command registry integration, docs, tests, quality-ledger-audit, npm test, and smoke are green.
